inputs.label: Equipment Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of machinery, computers, furniture, and other equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of machinery, computers, furniture, and other equipment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makine, bilgisayar, mobilya ve diğer ekipmanların maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Maschinen, Computer, Möbel und andere Ausrüstung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des machines, ordinateurs, meubles et autres équipements.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de maquinaria, computadoras, mobiliario y otros equipos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة الآلات وأجهزة الكمبيوتر والأثاث والمعدات الأخرى.

inputs.label: Legal & Permit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Legal fees, business registration, permits, and licenses.

label_i18n.fr: Coût des permis et frais juridiques

businessContext_i18n.en: Legal fees, business registration, permits, and licenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yasal ücretler, iş kaydı, izinler ve lisanslar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais juridiques, enregistrement de l'entreprise, permis et licences.
businessContext_i18n.es: Honorarios legales, registro comercial, permisos y licencias.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرسوم القانونية وتسجيل الأعمال والتصاريح والتراخيص.

inputs.label: Deposit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Rental deposits, utility deposits, and other refundable deposits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rental deposits, utility deposits, and other refundable deposits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kira depozitoları, hizmet depozitoları ve diğer iade edilebilir depozitolar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mietkautionen, Nebenkostendepots und andere rückzahlbare Kautionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépôts de garantie, dépôts pour services publics et autres dépôts remboursables.
businessContext_i18n.es: Depósitos de alquiler, depósitos de servicios públicos y otros depósitos reembolsables.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ودائع الإيجار وودائع المرافق والودائع الأخرى القابلة للاسترداد.

inputs.label: Initial Inventory Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of initial stock, raw materials, or finished goods.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of initial stock, raw materials, or finished goods.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk stok, hammadde veya mamul mal maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Anfangsbestand, Rohmaterialien oder Fertigwaren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût du stock initial, des matières premières ou des produits finis.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste del stock inicial, materias primas o productos terminados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة المخزون الأولي والمواد الخام أو السلع تامة الصنع.

inputs.label: Marketing Launch Cost
inputs.businessContext: Marketing, advertising, and promotional expenses for launch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Marketing, advertising, and promotional expenses for launch.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lansman için pazarlama, reklam ve tanıtım giderleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Marketing-, Werbe- und Verkaufsförderungskosten für den Start.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses de marketing, publicité et promotion pour le lancement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos de marketing, publicidad y promoción para el lanzamiento.

inputs.label: Working Capital
inputs.businessContext: Cash reserve to cover initial operating expenses before revenue.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cash reserve to cover initial operating expenses before revenue.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelir elde edilmeden önceki ilk işletme giderlerini karşılamak için nakit rezervi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betriebsmittelreserve zur Deckung anfänglicher Betriebsausgaben vor Umsatzerlösen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réserve de trésorerie pour couvrir les dépenses d'exploitation initiales avant les revenus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Reserva de efectivo para cubrir gastos operativos iniciales antes de generar ingresos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: احتياطي نقدي لتغطية مصاريف التشغيل الأولية قبل الإيرادات.

formulas.totalStartupCost: equipmentCost + legalAndPermitCost + depositCost + initialInventoryCost + marketingLaunchCost + workingCapital

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
